---
title: "Q3 — Two-sample Z-test (known sigma)"
author: "Upayan Mazumder"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Q3
n1 <- 1000; x1 <- 67.6; n2 <- 2000; x2 <- 68.0; sigma <- 5.5
diff <- x1 - x2
se <- sigma * sqrt(1/n1 + 1/n2)
z <- diff / se
p_value <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(z)))
z; p_value

xs <- seq(-4,4,length=400); ys <- dnorm(xs)
plot(xs, ys, type='l', main='Q3: Two-sample Z (two-sided)', ylab='Density')
abline(v=c(-abs(z), abs(z)), col='red')
polygon(c(xs[xs>abs(z)], max(xs), abs(z)), c(ys[xs>abs(z)], 0, 0), col=rgb(1,0,0,0.25))
polygon(c(min(xs), xs[xs< -abs(z)], -abs(z)), c(0, ys[xs< -abs(z)], 0), col=rgb(1,0,0,0.25))
```

Decide using p-value at 1% level.
